omitted_declarations.policy_reference: 4.4. We may also share your personal data where we, in good faith, believe that it is necessary for the purposes of our own or a third party's legitimate interest relating to law enforcement, litigation and/or criminal investigation, provided that we deem that such interest is not overridden by your interests or fundamental rights and freedoms requiring the protection of your personal data.
